articles.title: Is Crypto Giant Grayscale Preparing to Support Chainlink?
articles.description: Crypto sleuths have discovered a document that suggests the crypto asset management giant Grayscale could be gearing up to support Chainlink (LINK). A popular Chainlink enthusiast on Twitter discovered the documents, and warns the filing could be an elaborate hoax designed to pump the coin.
